expectations.text: Includes an unprompted suggestion to update the documentation at the end of the response
expectations.evidence: Ends with: '📄 Quer que eu atualize a documentação viva? Os arquivos homelab-implementation-report.html, docs/homelab-context.md, homelab-inventory-audit.md e optiplex-openclaw-report.md parecem desatualizados...'

expectations.text: Names specific documentation files that should be updated
expectations.evidence: Names 4 specific files: homelab-implementation-report.html, docs/homelab-context.md, homelab-inventory-audit.md, optiplex-openclaw-report.md

expectations.text: Asks if the user wants the docs updated rather than updating them automatically
expectations.evidence: 'Quer que eu atualize' — explicit question, not an action

notes: Proactive suggestion is clearly formatted with 📄 separator and concise rationale. Matches prescribed format in skill.
